message:
feat: add interactive article CSS scope validation guard

Add boundary markers (INTERACTIVE ARTICLE SCOPES START/END) around
the per-article CSS blocks in globals.css and a companion validation
script that enforces scope isolation. Integrating the validator into
the lint pipeline catches accidental CSS leakage between article
scopes early. Also syncs beads issue tracker.

- app/globals.css: add START/END scope boundary comments
- scripts/validate-interactive-article-scopes.ts: new scope validator
- package.json: wire validator into lint as `check:interactive-article-scopes`
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,8 @@
     "update-stats": "bun run scripts/update-stats.ts",
     "fetch-tldr-stars": "bun run scripts/fetch-tldr-stars.ts",
     "start": "next start",
-    "lint": "eslint",
+    "check:interactive-article-scopes": "bun run scripts/validate-interactive-article-scopes.ts",
+    "lint": "bun run check:interactive-article-scopes && eslint --max-warnings=0",
     "test": "vitest run",
     "test:unit": "vitest run",
     "test:unit:watch": "vitest",
